title: Brazilian-Style Baguette with Umami Dipping Sauce
description: A twist on the classic French baguette, served with a rich and savory dipping sauce. Perfect for a snack or light lunch.
instructions: Slice the baguette into 1-inch thick rounds.
In a small bowl, mix together the softened butter, heavy cream, and soy sauce.
Dip each baguette round into the umami dipping sauce, coating both sides.
Place the coated baguette rounds on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve immediately in a large bowl and enjoy!
